name: Microwave Crunchy Caramel Corn
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Hexagon shaped corn & rice, cereal
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large microwave-safe bowl, combine popcorn, cereal and nuts.
2. In a 4-cup measuring cup, combine butter, brown sugar, corn syrup and salt.
3. Microwave on HIGH for 1-1/2 minutes; stir.
4. Microwave on HIGH for 45 seconds to 2 minutes until the mixture comes to a rolling boil.
5. Stir in vanilla and baking soda. The mixture will become foamy.
6. Pour over popcorn mix; toss to coat.
7. Spread half of the mix evenly in a 12x8 inches dish.
8. Microwave on HIGH for 2-3 minutes or until the popcorn is evenly coated and glazed, stirring every minute.
9. Spread on foil to cool. The popcorn will become crisp as it cools.
10. Repeat with the remaining popcorn.
11. Allow the mixture to dry for 2 hours. Store in a tightly covered container.
